---
title: "Research"
---

## Publications

1. [**"Cash Crops and The Development-Environment Tradeoff: Evidence from Benin."**](https://le.uwpress.org/content/early/2026/04/06/le.102.4.060225-0044R2)  
(with Zhenong Jin and Leikun Yin). **Land Economics, 2026**  
[[pdf]](/pdf/cashews_benin.pdf)[[appendix]](/pdf/cashews_benin_appendix.pdf) 

2. [**"Infrastructure, Institutions, and the Conservation of Biodiversity in India."**](https://www.journals.uchicago.edu/doi/10.1086/735284)  
**Journal of the Association of Environmental and Resource Economists, 2025**   
[[pdf]](/pdf/rmadhok_jmp_2022.pdf)[[appendix]](/pdf/jmp_appendix.pdf)[[podcast]](https://ideasofindia.libsyn.com/next-guest)[[commentary]](https://voxdev.org/topic/energy-environment/can-inclusive-institutions-balance-development-biodiversity-trade)

3. [**"Ruling The Roost: Avian Species Reclaim Urban Habitat During India's COVID-19 Lockdown."**](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0006320722001501)   
(with Sumeet Gulati). **Biological Conservation, 2022**

4. [**"Saving the world from your couch: The heterogeneous benefits of COVID-19 lockdowns on air pollution."**](https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/1748-9326/abee4d)  
(with J.P. Bonardi, Q. Gallea, D. Kalanoski, R. Lalive, F. Noack, D. Rohner, and T. Sonno)   
**Environmental Research Letters, 2021** 

## Working Papers 

1. [**"Tribal Forest Rights and Firm Behaviour."**](/pdf/forests_and_firms.pdf) (with Sabyasachi Das)  

2. [**Does Women's Autonomy Improve Forest Restoration? Experimental Evidence from the Himalayas."**](/pdf/forest_hp_rct.pdf)   
(with P. Choksi, E. Coleman, H. Fischer, F. Fleischman, M. Khanyari, P. Rana, E. Sills)  
Conditionally Accepted via Pre-Results Review, **Journal of Development Economics**

3. [**"Urban Growth and the Spatial Reorganization of Agriculture."**](/pdf/2022_rural_urban_agriculture.pdf)  [[NBER WP](https://www.nber.org/papers/w33854)][[commentary](https://www.ideasforindia.in/topics/agriculture/internal-migration-and-spatial-reorganisation-of-agriculture.html)]  
(with Frederik Noack, Mushfiq Mobarak, and Olivier Deschenes)  
Revision Requested, **American Economic Journal: Economic Policy**

4. [**"Off-Target Impacts of Targeted Policy: Evidence from Colombia."**](/pdf/coca_colombia.pdf)  **Submitted.**  
(with Tatiana Zarate-Barrera)

5. [**"Ethnic Favouritism in Environmental Disaster Payouts."**](/pdf/favouritism_hwc.pdf)  **Submitted.**  
(with Sumeet Gulati and Pushpendra Rana)

## Selected Works in Progress

1. "<u>Willingness to Pay for Biodiversity: Evidence from Recreation Demand. </u>"  
(with Matt Braaksma, Ryan Mcway, and Jovin Lasway) 

2. "<u>Gross Ecosystem Product.</u>" (with [NatCap TEEMS](https://natcapteems.umn.edu/))

3. "<u>The Ecological Costs of Aerial Coca Eradication.</u>"      
(with Colleen Miller and Tatiana Zarate-Barrera)

## Resting Papers

1. [**"The Long Run Effects of Coal Power Plants on Health."**](/pdf/power_plants_india.pdf)  
(with Rohini Pande, Kevin Rowe, and Anish Sugathan)
